scope: Capability-facing comparison between canonical API2 tid=535, the previously confirmed alternate positive tids 540/541, and the new mid-corridor findings 488/502/506
verdict: Current anonymous direct-call evidence no longer supports reading API2 positive tid space as only 535/540/541. The 456-521 mid-corridor follow-up adds stable positive branches at 488 and 502, plus a stable success-shell family at 506.

Canonical tid=535 remains the strongest caller-default branch because it is still the only branch with stable fuller-detail rows that include defn/state/upload_src/category_map/cover_list/vwh on the established public matrix.

tid=488 is a stable thinner positive shell across the current 3-VID matrix: title and url stay present, but the branch does not currently rise into duration/defn/state/upload_src/category_map/cover_list fullness.
tid=502 is a stable richer alternate positive shell across the current 3-VID matrix: it materializes title/url/duration/vid/cover_list/create_time, but still does not reach canonical 535 richness.

tid=506 should currently stay in the success-shell family rather than the positive-branch family. The current 3-VID matrix gives top-level success in XML and JSONP, and the new dedicated Python/Go plus raw XML validation still confirms an effectively empty caller-facing shell on the primary public sample.

502.current_shape: title + url + duration + vid + cover_list + create_time shell

488.current_shape: title + url shell in the demo matrix, with targeted raw follow-up additionally showing picture-field materialization on the primary public VID

506.current_shape: top-level success with effectively empty XML/JSONP fields in the current demo matrix

api2_shapes.502: thin_positive_shell on all 3 public VIDs, but with a higher richness_score than 488/540/541 thanks to duration/vid/cover_list/create_time
api2_shapes.535: fuller_detail_row on the successful established public samples in the extended matrix, with the broader canonical proof anchored by the earlier matrix and demo-validation artifacts

documentation_rule: Keep tid=535 as the canonical caller-default when the caller expects the strongest chance of a fuller detail row.
Promote tid=488 and tid=502 into the documented alternate-positive family at the research and parameter-contract layers before upgrading them into direct caller-facing recipes.
Describe tid=502 as richer than 488/540/541, but still not field-equivalent to canonical tid=535.
Keep tid=506 below positive-detail recipe level; dedicated raw/demo validation now confirms a stable near-empty success shell rather than caller-facing non-empty field materialization.
remaining_open_questions: Whether tid=488 can be upgraded from a thin positive shell to a more specific picture-shell family at the caller-facing validation layer remains open because the current demo parser does not surface picture fields directly.
Whether tid=502 can be promoted to a dedicated direct-call recipe before raw/demo validation parity is added remains open.
Whether tid=506 ever materializes stable non-empty caller-facing fields on broader samples or under aged-cookie/login-state replay remains open.
